So many good Crypto projects have failed since 2022. The main reasons, in my opinion:

1. Lack of liquidity
2. Poor marketing

4. Poor timing ⏱️

results.text:
"We don't have a marketing department. We're not planning to get one." - Alex Karp (2012)
This vintage interview from 2012 shows the original DNA of Palantir.

The Strategy: While every other B2B company was hiring sales armies, Palantir hired zero
salespeople.

Why? Alex Karp believed that if you have a sales team, you focus on "next quarter's revenue."

If you have an engineering team, you focus on "solving the problem 3 years from now."

results.name: Alex - Web3 Marketer
results.bio: I audit Web3 growth strategies — then build the ones that actually work. Host @ooo_podcast| Founder @web3mktghack| @Bybit_Official VIP Hunter |@shefiorg 7
results.text: @hanshanhk I had a call today with someone who's co-founder and product manager for that project and told me "we didn't have much success hiring a proper marketer, we're just a bunch of devs, we looked at whose CV looked better, not at who fits the culture or believes in what we're building"
